description: CompositionPink T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, slightly ribbed neckline, flock print detailing on the inside of the neckline and flock print on the frontFitRegularWash careHand wash with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededWarm iron do not iron on decorationsIf you're a fan of comics and superman, then this range of t-shirts from bioworld is the perfect choice. The vibrant pink colour and graphics transports you to your childhood fantasies, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Pair this with jeans or shorts and slip-ons.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo
